2.content:
# Host Units

* Read more about Host Units [here](https://www.dynatrace.com/support/help/shortlink/application-and-infrastructure-host-units)

## Full Stack Monitoring

* Hosts with monitoring visibility from the Application layer to individual transactions
* 1 Host Unit per 16 GB


## Infrastructure Only

* Hosts with only Host and Process level monitoring
* 0.3 Host Units per 16 GB
* Caps at 1 Host Unit for 64 GB

4.content:
# Digital Experience Monitoring Units (DEM)

* Read more about DEM Units [here](https://www.dynatrace.com/support/help/shortlink/digital-experience-monitoring-units)

## Real User Monitoring (RUM)

* User session per application (With Session Replay) = 1.0 DEM
* User session per application	(Without Session Replay playback) =	0.25 DEM

* Session & Action Properties = 0.01 DEM

## Synthetics

* Synthetic actions (Browser Monitors, Browser Clickpaths)	 = 1.0 DEM

* Synthetic request (HTTP monitor) = 0.1 DEM
* Third-party synthetic result	(Third-party synthetic API ingestion) = 0.1 DEM

6.content:
# Davis Data Units (DDUs)

* Read more about DDUs [here](https://www.dynatrace.com/support/help/shortlink/davis-data-units)

## Included DDUs
* 1000 Metrics (525,600 DDUs) are included per Host Unit

## Metrics

* Each Metric data point = 0.001 DDU

* 1 Metric = 525.6 DDUs per Year

* 1 data point x 60 min x 24 hours x 365 days x 0.001 DDU weight = 525.6 DDUs per year, per metric.



## Logs
* One Log Entry = 0.0005 DDUs
* 1 DDU = 2000 Log Entries

## Serverless
* 1 AWS Lambda Function Invocation = 0.002 DDUs

* 1 DDU = 500 AWS Lambda Function Invocations
